name: Apotheca Biosciences, Inc.
summary: Apotheca Biosciences, Inc. develops cutting-edge medical products, nutraceuticals, formulations, and delivery technologies for the healthcare and consumer care industry in the United States. The company's products include transdermal, sublingual, and nasal delivery devices for dosing of cannabinoids. It also provides CBD pain cream, gel capsules, patches, and sleep tablets; and Promed, anti-aging and cosmetic products. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Saint Petersburg, Florida.
